text: The sense of an ending lingers in the air, yet I feel present and subtly charged in this environment focused on research, innovation, and potential. There is a quiet satisfaction, as if I am walking away from an unfinished conversation with possibility itself, left to reflect on the interplay of invention and the unknown. Each boundary—the glass wall, the illuminated signs, the themes of R+D—reminds me that departure often sparks anticipation, as every closure hints at a promising next chapter. I feel both finished and just beginning.
